name: Marcia's Red Onion with Raspberry Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
This delicious recipe comes from Marcia Fox, a Washington, D.C.
cooking teacher and caterer. Make these onion up to eight hours ahead of time.
1. Peel onions, leaving root ends intact.
2. Cut each onion into 8 wedges.
3. Arrange the onion wedges in a single layer on a platter.
4. Drizzle vinegar over the onions.
5. Let stand for 20 minutes.
6. Preheat the broiler.
7. Cover a baking sheet with foil and place the onion wedges in a single layer on the prepared sheet.
8. Brush both sides of the onions lightly with oil, then sprinkle with salt and pepper.
9. Broil 2 inches from the heat source until brown but not charred, about 8 minutes per side.
10. Transfer the onions to the platter.
11. Sprinkle 1½ tablespoons reserved vinegar over the onions.
12. Cool to room temperature.
(You can prepare this up to eight hours in advance. Cover and let stand at room temperature.)
